title: KitchenPerfected 100W Multi Chopper / 1 Speed Operation Plus Turbo Button / Stainless Steel Blades / Whisk Attachment / Plastic Bowl / 300ml Capacity - Ivory White - E5413WI
features: CHOPPER: The Multichopper is ideal for baby foods, herbs, meat, vegetables or fruit.
TURBO BUTTON: Hold down the turbo button to increase the blade speed for easier chopping of light ingredients and provides a pulse operation.
STAINLESS STEEL CHOPPING BLADES: the sharp twin blades easily cut and dice vegetables, fruit, meat or other ingredients.
300ML MIXING BOWL: The mixing bowl is easily removeable and dishwasher safe
COMPACT: The compact design makes it convenient for small kitchens or where small amounts are required such as baby foods.
description: The KitchenPerfected 100W Multi Chopper is a compact and convenient kitchen device that helps to prepare ingredients. It features sharp twin stainless steel chopping blades rapidly cuts through meat, vegtables, fruit, herbs, soft nuts etc in preperation from salads, baby food, minced meat etc. This chopper has a 1 speed operation plus a turbo button for pulse operation, which provides two (2) speeds and varied chopping styles. The 300ml mixing bowl is dishwasher safe also has a measuring gauge on the side, which is perfect for perfectly measuring out and preparing ingredients, all whilst the removable rubber base keeps everything stable. Box Includes: 1 x KitchenPerfected 100W Multi Chopper 1x Instruction Manual
